disclaimer: Ranges are Nash/GTO approximations for study purposes. Verify with professional solvers (GTO Wizard, PioSolver) for critical decisions.

position_notes.UTG: Under the Gun เนโฌโ€ earliest position, tightest range
position_notes.MP: Middle Position เนโฌโ€ tight but wider than UTG
position_notes.LJ: Lojack เนโฌโ€ one off hijack, moderate opening
position_notes.HJ: Hijack เนโฌโ€ two off button, opens wider
position_notes.CO: Cutoff เนโฌโ€ just before button, wide opens
position_notes.BTN: Button เนโฌโ€ widest opens, best position postflop
position_notes.SB: Small Blind เนโฌโ€ first to act postflop, aggressive pre
position_notes.BB: Big Blind เนโฌโ€ defends wide vs late position opens

20BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB 20BB first in: shove/raise/limp/fold mix. Premiums shove or raise; small limp range with low SC and weak Ax. (v1.5.0)

5BB_BTN_RFI.notes: BTN shoves any pair, any ace, wide suited connectors ~52%

5BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB vs BB shoves ~48%, slightly tighter than BTN

100BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB 100BB first in: limp/raise/fold mix. Limp wide protective range, raise top + medium broadways. (v1.5.0)

40BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB 40BB first in: limp/raise/fold mix. Smaller limp range, more raise-only premiums. (v1.5.0)

60BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB 60BB first in: limp/raise/fold mix. Limp range tightens slightly vs 100BB. (v1.5.0)

80BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB 80BB first in: limp/raise/fold mix. Slightly more raise-heavy than 100BB. (v1.5.0)

10BB_BB_vs_shove_btn.notes: BB 10BB vs BTN 45% shove: call ~36% (all aces, broad SC)

10BB_BB_vs_shove_sb.notes: BB 10BB vs SB 48% shove: call ~41% (all aces + Kx suited)

5BB_BB_vs_shove_btn.notes: BB 5BB vs BTN 50%+ shove: call ~58% (huge pot odds)

100BB_BTN_vs_3bet.notes: BTN 100BB vs 3bet: pure 4bet KK+/AK, wide flat, A3s/A2s 4bet bluffs (v1.2.1)

100BB_CO_vs_3bet.notes: CO 100BB vs 3bet: 4bet KK+/AKs, call Broadways + middle pairs, edges mixed

40BB_BTN_vs_3bet.notes: BTN 40BB vs 3bet: shove TT+/AQs+/AKo, no flat

60BB_BTN_vs_3bet.notes: BTN 60BB vs 3bet: 4bet commits JJ+/AK, call TT-77 + premium suited

100BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: BB 100BB vs BTN: pure 3bet JJ+/AKs, wide Broadways/pairs flat, suited connectors added (v1.2.1)

100BB_BB_vs_raise_co.notes: BB 100BB vs CO: tighter than vs BTN, suited connectors added (v1.2.1)

100BB_BB_vs_raise_sb.notes: BB 100BB vs SB: defend wide, offsuit connectors + AJo/AJs 3bet mixing (v1.2.2)

20BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: BB 20BB vs BTN open: pure 3bet most premiums, AA/QQ mix (sometimes trap-call)

40BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: BB 40BB vs BTN: pure 3bet JJ+/AK, wide flat Broadways+SC, suited connectors + thin Kx/Ax mixed (v1.2.2)

40BB_BB_vs_raise_co.notes: BB 40BB vs CO: tighter than vs BTN, mix edges, bluff 3bet A5s/A4s (v1.3.0)

40BB_BB_vs_raise_sb.notes: BB 40BB vs SB: defend wide, extensive offsuit connector mixing (v1.3.0)

60BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: BB 60BB vs BTN: polarized โ€” bit more 3bet, still wide call, SC mixed (v1.3.0)

60BB_BB_vs_raise_co.notes: BB 60BB vs CO: tight defend, fewer edge mixes than vs BTN (v1.3.0)

60BB_BB_vs_raise_sb.notes: BB 60BB vs SB: widest defense, extensive mixing across edges (v1.3.0)

80BB_BB_vs_raise_btn.notes: BB 80BB vs BTN: slightly wider than 60BB, includes more SC (v1.3.0)

80BB_BB_vs_raise_co.notes: BB 80BB vs CO: between 60BB CO and 100BB CO, tighter than BTN (v1.3.0)

80BB_BB_vs_raise_sb.notes: BB 80BB vs SB: between 60BB SB and 100BB SB, very wide defense (v1.3.0)

100BB_BB_vs_limp_sb.notes: BB vs SB limp 100BB: iso wide value + balance bluffs, check rest. (v1.5.0)

80BB_BB_vs_limp_sb.notes: BB vs SB limp 80BB: iso wide, mix bluffs. Similar structure to 100BB. (v1.5.0)

60BB_BB_vs_limp_sb.notes: BB vs SB limp 60BB: iso for value + selective bluffs, more checks. (v1.5.0)

40BB_BB_vs_limp_sb.notes: BB vs SB limp 40BB: iso tighter for value, less wide bluffs (SPR favors check). (v1.5.0)

20BB_BB_vs_limp_sb.notes: BB vs SB limp 20BB: jam premiums for value/FE, iso medium, check rest. (v1.5.0)
